overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban underpass in Night City. The player passes holographic advertisements, encounters a crime scene with an NCPD officer investigating a body, and navigates through a futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with luxury billboard advertisements

events.description: black sedan drives past from left to right on the street
pedestrian with pink hair passes close by on the left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, approaching the underpass entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair and white outfit walking past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement showing a fashion model in white outfit with brand name visible
massive concrete overpass structure with yellow ambient lighting underneath
tall glass towers with illuminated windows forming the dense city skyline
floating digital advertisements and neon signs on distant building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered walkway beneath a massive highway overpass in Night City. A prominent Giovanni Breeze fashion billboard stands on the right while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. A black sedan drives past on the left, followed by a pedestrian with distinctive pink hair walking close by the camera as the player approaches the darker underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed underpass corridor with red neon accent lighting and cargo containers

events.description: moving from semi-covered walkway into fully enclosed underpass tunnel with reduced visibility
red neon strip lights become prominent on the right wall, casting crimson glow on concrete surfaces

agents.ego_description: continuing through the underpass corridor, passing red neon installations on the right wall and cargo containers

entered.detail: horizontal red LED strips mounted on the concrete wall creating ambient lighting effects
large red shipping container with white horizontal stripes parked on the left side of the path
tall digital screen displaying AVANTE fashion advertisement with a male model

segments.scene_description: The player enters the enclosed underpass tunnel where the environment becomes darker and more confined. Red neon light strips illuminate the right wall while a large red cargo container appears on the left. The AVANTE digital billboard becomes visible ahead on the right as the Giovanni Breeze billboard disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass crime scene investigation area with police barrier tape and cargo containers

events.description: discovering a crime scene with a body lying on the ground and NCPD officer standing nearby investigating

agents.ego_description: walking past a crime scene where an NCPD officer is examining a body on the ground near green cargo containers

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer in uniform standing over a body on the ground, investigating the crime scene near yellow barrier tape

entered.detail: yellow and black striped caution tape cordoning off the crime scene area
deceased person lying face down on the pavement near the investigating officer
green military-style cargo crate with hazard markings and boxes stacked nearby

segments.scene_description: The player encounters a crime scene within the underpass where yellow police tape cordons off an area around a body on the ground. An NCPD officer stands nearby investigating, while green cargo containers and stacked boxes line the left side. The red neon lights recede into the distance as the player navigates past the investigation area.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass exit transitioning to open street with parked vehicles and storefronts

events.description: exiting the enclosed underpass into a more open street area with visible sky and distant traffic
approaching a parked black van with a pedestrian visible walking ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the underpass exit, approaching a parked van and distant pedestrian on the open street

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking away from camera toward the street intersection ahead

entered.detail: large black utility van parked in the middle of the path blocking part of the walkway
storefronts with illuminated signs and neon lighting visible beyond the underpass exit

segments.scene_description: The player exits the underpass into a more open urban area where the sky becomes visible again. A black van is parked ahead blocking part of the path, while storefronts with bright neon signs line the right side. The crime scene elements disappear behind as the environment opens up to the broader city street with distant skyscrapers visible once more.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright urban walkway through a claustrophobic underpass and back into the open city streets. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, passing a Giovanni Breeze fashion billboard and a pink-haired pedestrian as the camera moves toward a darkening tunnel entrance. As the player enters the enclosed underpass, the environment becomes more confined, shifting from open air to a space illuminated by red neon strips and flanked by large cargo containers. The scene then transitions into a cordoned-off crime scene where the camera navigates past yellow police tape and an investigating NCPD officer amidst stacked boxes and green containers. Finally, the camera exits the tunnel into a broader urban area, moving past a parked black van and bright neon storefronts as the towering skyscrapers of the city skyline reappear overhead.
